caption: The video depicts soldiers in a desolate, outdoor setting with dirt ground and simple buildings in the background. The soldiers are dressed in camouflage uniforms, wearing helmets and tactical gear, including vests and pouches. Several individuals have bright yellow bands tied around their upper arms. In the initial scenes, soldiers are moving across the open area, with some walking away from the camera and others partially visible in the foreground. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts to focus more closely on the gear of the soldiers, highlighting their camouflage patterns and equipment. The text "Hero Ukraine" is overlaid on the images, and a red and white "13" logo appears in the upper right corner of each shot. The movement is steady as the soldiers navigate the terrain, maintaining a formation as they advance through the environment.
